config.script:
"""
	Written By: Niladri Banejee
	Written Date: 06/05/2024
	Event: onStartup
	Purpose:			 
			After Session TimeOut all custom property of session are cleared.	
			So, On Startup check if previousPageUrl is cleared then go on Login page.
	"""	
	try:
	#start of try block 
		previousPage = self.session.custom.previousPageUrl
		if(str(previousPage) != 'login'):
			system.perspective.navigate('/')
		else:
			currentUserModules = self.session.custom.currentUserModules
			currentUserScreens = self.session.custom.currentUserScreens
			screenName =self.params.Screenname
			value,editValue = Project_VECV.UserRoleAuthentication.UserRoleAuthentication.getUserRoleAccessData('',screenName,currentUserModules,currentUserScreens)	
			if(int(value) == 0):
				system.perspective.navigate('/homepage')	
	#End of try block		
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Work Instruction'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Configuration/WorkInstruction')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onStartup  -> WorkInstruction')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

try:
		system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
		system.perspective.openDock('rightView')
		selectedRow = self.props.selection.selectedRow
		pydata = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(self.props.data)
		countWI = 0
		selectedcol=self.props.selection.selectedColumn
		if(len(pydata) > 0):
			for rows in range(len(pydata)):
				if(selectedRow == rows):
					WIid = pydata[rows]['ID']
					name = pydata[rows]['WIName']
					desc = pydata[rows]['Description']
					areaId = pydata[rows]['AreaID']	
					lineId = pydata[rows]['LineID']
					workStationId=pydata[rows]['WorkstationID']
					#curriculumCode=pydata[rows]['Curriculum code']
					isAcive = pydata[rows]['IsActive']
					#isReworkWI=pydata[rows]['Rework work instruction']
					self.getSibling("cntRelation").props.params.WI_ID=WIid
					self.getSibling("cntRelation").props.params.WI_Name='WI name - '+name
					break
					
		#params = {"WIID":int(WIid)}		
		#result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Master/WorkInstructionConfiguration/GetCountWI_Used (1)",params)
		#system.perspective.sendMessage("getWICount",payload = {"wiCount":int(result)}, scope = "page")
		#if(result==0):
			system.perspective.print('workStationId- '+str(workStationId))
			headerLabel = "Edit"
			messageType = 'WiGeneralPannel'	
			folderName = 'Project_VECV/WI'	
			self.getSibling("cntDelete").props.params.id = int(WIid)
			self.getSibling("cntDelete").props.params.folderName = folderName
			self.getSibling("cntDelete").props.params.colName = 'Id'
			system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":1}, scope = "page")
			system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":1}, scope = "page")
			
			params = {"WIID":int(WIid)}
			result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Master/WorkInstructionConfiguration/GetWI_UsedStepCount",params)
			UsedStepCount=result
					
			payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,'WIid':int(WIid),'name':str(name),'desc':str(desc),'areaId':int(areaId),'lineId':int(lineId),'WorkStationId':int(workStationId),'isActive':int(isAcive),'UsedStepCount':int(UsedStepCount),}		 			
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )
		else:		
			Project_VECV.DWI.DWI.Validation.showPopup('You cannot edit/delete this workinstruction as it is in progress.')
		
#		if str(selectedcol)=='Relation':
#			system.perspective.closePopup('BitPopup')
#			messageType = 'GetRelationParameters'   				
#			payload = {'FromScreen':'WI','columnName':'Relation'}		 			
#			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )
#			system.perspective.sendMessage("ShowRelation",scope = "page")
#			system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")
#			system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")
#			system.perspective.sendMessage("tableRow",payload = {"Index":-1}, scope = "page")
	except: 
		#start of except block  
			screenName ='Work Instruction'   
			filePath=str('Project_VECV/Configuration/WorkInstruction')  
			errorFunction = str('Event:onRowClick  -> cntBody/tblWorkInstruction')  
			errorType=str('Application')  
			errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
			description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
			lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
			Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
		#End of except block

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	
	#equipData = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Master/WorkInstructionConfiguration/GetWorkInstruction")	
	#self.props.data = equipData
	self.refreshBinding("props.data")
	headerLabel = "Add"
	messageType = 'WiGeneralPannel'   				
	payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,'WIid':int(0),'name':'','desc':'','areaId':-1,'lineId':-1,'WorkStationId':-1,'isActive':1,'UsedStepCount':int(0)}		 			
	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )
	
	system.perspective.sendMessage("tableRow",payload = {"Index":-1}, scope = "page")	
	system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")	
	system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")
	self.props.pager.activePage=1
	self.props.filter.results.enabled=0

# implement your handler here
	self.props.selection.selectedRow = payload['Index']

# implement your handler here
		system.perspective.print('In Popup')
		
		state=payload['state']
		message=payload['text']
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")

"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 06/05/2024
	Purpose:
			This message handler written to refresh table,  
			pass default value to Maintenance Pannel and 
			reset button on the form like Edit and Delete.
	"""
	# implement your handler here
	try:
		self.meta.visible = payload['IsVisible']
		if(self.meta.visible==1):
			self.props.params.workStationId =payload['WorkStationId']
			self.props.params.wiId = int(payload['WIId'])
			self.props.params.header=str(payload['Header'])
			wiId=self.props.params.wiId
			#assignedFixtureList=[]
			#self.props.params.AssignedFixtureList=[]
			
			# For edit get selected WIId and get Details of step and fixture from the database 
			if(wiId!=0):
				assignedList=[]
				# Getting AssignedStep from database for selected WIId
				params = {"WIId":int(wiId)}			
				result=system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Master/WorkInstructionConfiguration/GetWI_AssignedStep",params)	
				stepList = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(result)
				if(len(stepList)>0):
					for rows in range(len(stepList)):
						wiStepId=stepList[rows]['WIOPID']
						stepId=stepList[rows]['ID']
						stepclassId=stepList[rows]['OP Definition ID']
						sequenceNo=stepList[rows]['Sequence']
						stepName=stepList[rows]['OPCode']
						description=stepList[rows]['Description']
						Model=stepList[rows]['Model']
						stepClass=stepList[rows]['OPDefinition']
						assignedList.append({"WIStepId":wiStepId,"ID":stepId,"Sequence":int(sequenceNo),"OP Code":stepName,"OP Definition ID":stepclassId,"Description":description,"OP Definition":stepClass,"Model":Model})
					system.perspective.print(assignedList)
					self.props.params.AsignedStepList=assignedList
	except:	
		#start of except block		
		screenName ='Work instruction' 
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Configuration/WorkInstruction')
		errorFunction = str('Message Handler:addEditWorkInstruction -> cntBody/cntAddEditPopup')
		errorType=str('Application')
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID()) 
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error occur			
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

# implement your handler here
	system.perspective.print('In Popup')
	#self.meta.visible = payload['display']
	#self.props.params.lblValue = payload['text']
	state='success'
	message=payload['text']
	Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
